---
title: "Mary Coulthard"
---

## Mary Coulthard

**Dates:** (b. Alton 1795/6)

### Description

maternal grandmother of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

'old Mrs Coulthard' lived with her daughter Frances Charlotte Hilare Coulthard in Hastings in the 1861 census.

### Letters

- Letter from July 25th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
